narrative:
Waynesville Village B (precinct in Warren County) has 1,037 registered voters, with 48.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 41.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 30.9 percentage points.
